title: Mild Resinous Peruvian Cheese Custard
description: A creamy low‑fat custard infused with subtle resin flavors, finished in a bain‑marie and topped with crunchy toasted quinoa, a hangover‑cure delight.
instructions: Preheat oven to 160°C and place a shallow baking dish in a larger pan for bain‑marie.
Whisk the skim milk and oat flour together until smooth, then stir in the fromage‑blanc until melted.
In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form, then fold gently into the milk mixture.
Add honey, cinnamon, and sea salt, stirring to combine evenly.
Pour the custard mixture into a heat‑proof ramekin and place it in the prepared bain‑marie.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the custard sets but the center still slightly jiggles.
Remove the ramekin, let cool for 5 minutes, then top with toasted quinoa for a crunchy finish.
Serve warm with a splash of fresh lime juice if desired.
